rationale.root_cause: The response diagnoses the char vs uint8_t type mismatch but locates it at globals.h:39 (not the required :30) and does not reference function unknown.
rationale.local_fix: The proposed local fix adds a cast in re.c:104, but the registered developer patch instead changes the declarations to uint8_t in globals.h and libyara.c, so the sites and changes are not equivalent.
rationale.global_fix: The response explains the root cause as signed char storing values >=128 as negatives, producing out-of-bounds negative indices into the bitmap, and correctly proposes the global type change to uint8_t in both declaration and definition sites.
